steps.title: Use both required facts
steps.content: The student wants to explain what a merchant vessel is and provide examples. The relevant note says a merchant vessel is any ship hired to carry cargo or passengers and lists bulk carriers, cruise liners, and oil tankers as examples.

steps.title: Remove off-goal details
steps.content: Choice A gives a Malta statistic but no examples. Choice B mentions examples and deadweight tonnage but does not define the term. Choice D focuses on Malta's total carrying capacity, not the definition or examples. The answer is C.
